title: dimerocostus strobilaceus subsp. gutierrezii
intro: Dimerocostus strobilaceus subsp. gutierrezii, also known as Gutierrez's dimerocostus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Alstroemeriaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to the high-altitude regions of Central America, particularly in Costa Rica, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which are believed to provide relief from pain and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis and muscle strain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
